title: Modalia AI is launching soon
subtitle: We're putting the final touches on the global release. Leave your email and be the first to know the moment it goes live.
perkBody: Submit your email now and we'll send you a 1-month free pass the day we launch.
successBody: Thanks for signing up. We'll email you at launch — with your 1-month free pass included.
error: Please enter a valid email address and try again.
privacy: We'll only use your email to notify you about the launch. No spam.
